name: proton-drive-cli-mcp
description: Codex plugin that exposes Proton Drive through the official Proton Drive CLI MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Browse and manage Proton Drive from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides a local MCP server that wraps the official Proton Drive CLI for authenticated file, folder, sharing, and invitation workflows. Authentication stays in the Proton CLI and OS secret store.
defaultPrompt: Check my Proton Drive auth status.
List the root of my Proton Drive.
Upload this file to Proton Drive.
